user.title: Shark IQ Login
user.description:
SharkNinja makes this difficult — their login uses captcha and a mobile-only redirect, so you may need browser DevTools to complete setup. [See the full walkthrough](https://github.com/dr34ming/ha-sharkiq#setup)

1. Open this URL in your browser (with DevTools Network tab open):

{authorize_url}

2. Log in with your SharkClean account
3. After login, the browser redirects to a `com.sharkninja.shark://` URL — this shows a gray screen or error, that's normal
4. In DevTools Network tab, find the 302 redirect and copy the `location` header value (`com.sharkninja.shark://...?code=...`)
5. Paste it below and submit quickly — the code expires in ~30 seconds

Tokens are saved and auto-refreshed, so you only need to do this once.

data_description.callback_url: The com.sharkninja.shark://...?code=... URL from the 302 redirect Location header in DevTools

error.no_code: No authorization code found in URL. Copy the full callback URL including the ?code= parameter.
error.auth_failed: Auth0 token exchange failed. The code may have expired — try starting over with a fresh flow.
error.ayla_failed: Connected to Auth0 but Ayla token exchange failed. SharkNinja services may be down.

abort.already_configured: This Shark account is already configured.
